description: Stage 2 verification steps for the sandbox. ${filter} is a set of pnpm --filter args computed by verify-upgrade.sh to select only the affected workspace packages (changed package + its dependents). The sandbox packages define only build + test scripts, so those are the steps. verify-upgrade.sh picks packageOverrides[<dep>] if present, else defaults.

jest.description: Jest upgrades most often break tests; run tests first for fast feedback, then build.
